description: Claude Code-specific enforcement layer for the SDD quality loop. This file is referenced from .claude-plugin/plugin.json via the 'hooks' field and uses the officially recommended exec form with Node.js so the gates run identically on Windows (no Git Bash needed), macOS, and Linux. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is expanded by Claude Code itself before spawning and works in args on all operating systems. hooks/hooks.json remains the Codex CLI enforcement config; hooks/copilot-hooks.json remains the GitHub Copilot CLI variant.
